NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION, U.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, MICHAEL A. HUBAHIB, GLEN PALACA ASSIGNED TO REPRESENT PARTY FOR U. D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHAEL FRANKLIN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. MICHAEL A. FRANKLIN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
